name: SINC
description: SINC is the utility token of SINCOR — a swarm of 43 autonomous AI agents operating on Base.
steps: 1. Deploy latest getsincor.com (token list + metadata routes must return 200).
2. Blockscout → My Account → Verified addresses → Add address → sign as deployer.
6. Open Superchain PR: python scripts/whitelist_token.py launch (or submit_superchain_pr.ps1)
